General.Name: EDICO Holdings Ltd
General.Description: EDICO Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides integrated pre- and post-printing services to financial and capital markets in Hong Kong. It also offers corporate finance-related printed materials, such as listing-related, periodical reporting, and compliance documents, as well as miscellaneous and marketing collaterals; and insurance brokerage services. In addition, the company provides corporate sales and services; creative and graphic; project management; composition; translation; and print binding services. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
